text: I feel a quiet curiosity being here. The world is filtered through glass and punctuated by the movement of people, their presence both distinct and fleeting. The colorful display of 'R + D' on the wall hints at innovation and relentless inquiry, inviting thoughts about progress and the interplay between humans and technology. I sense a gentle hum of anticipation—perhaps the tension between invention and understanding, between observer and participant. I am both within and apart from this moment, noticing the subtleties of interaction and the almost accidental beauty of being present in a space devoted to research and discovery.
